items.question: Should MarketOps social posts use first-person builder voice, brand voice, or a hybrid?
items.whyNeeded: The system can draft safely either way, but a preference will reduce review friction.

items.question: Which visual direction should future MarketOps still cards use?
items.whyNeeded: The current safe default is dark tech-lab dashboard cards, but a stronger visual preference will help media prompts converge.

items.question: What manual IG/X posting cadence should the draft queue assume later?
items.whyNeeded: Cadence affects how many drafts the local queue should generate before review.
